# testdata

Pre-generated static fixtures used by the interop and edge-case test suites.
No external tools are required to run `go test ./...` — all fixtures are committed
to the repository.

## Subdirectories

| Directory | Contents |
|---|---|
| `openssl/` | SignedData and EnvelopedData structures generated by OpenSSL 3.x. Includes signer CA certificates and recipient key pairs. |
| `bc/` | SignedData and EnvelopedData structures produced by actual Bouncy Castle (via `CMSGenerator.groovy`). Includes signer certificates and recipient key pairs. |
| `edge_cases/` | Hand-crafted DER fixtures covering parser edge cases: BER encodings, large serial numbers, non-standard PSS salt lengths, multi-signer deduplication, and similar corner cases. |

`content.bin` is the payload signed or encrypted in every fixture.

## Regenerating fixtures

See [`DEVELOPMENT.md`](../DEVELOPMENT.md) for regeneration instructions.
Regeneration is only needed when adding new test cases or updating fixture
generation logic.
